name: Lizardfolk

changes.text: - Replace the human trait with the lizardfolk trait.
- Add a swim Speed of 15 feet.
- Replace any fist attacks with claw attacks. They deal slashing damage instead of bludgeoning.

abilities.name: Deep Breath
abilities.text: The iruxi can hold their breath for 15 minutes.

text: Lizardfolk recently began to discover and adapt to different cultures while bringing in their own. Lizardfolk value patience and seek guidance in the stars above. They are able to adapt to almost any environment, but generally prefer to be near the water.
